inputs.price_source: Yahoo WMB close pending mechanical refresh
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $5,898M less estimated maintenance capital spending $1,200M [Assumption], divided by 1,222M weighted-average diluted shares (10-K filed 2026-02-24); expansion capex $4,893M excluded from owner-cash start
inputs.dividend_source: Cash dividends declared $2.00 per share in 2025; payments $2,442M (10-K)
inputs.normalization_note: Midstream infrastructure: Lawrence uses cash from operations minus maintenance capital spending, not total growth capex. FY2026 growth capital guide $6.1-6.7B is embedded in segment growth assumptions, not FCF₀.

growth_explanation.years_1_5: Transco and Gulf Coast transmission expansions under firm transportation contracts; Power Innovation data-center projects (1.9 GW Ohio/Utah, up to 12.5-year fixed-price agreements); Haynesville and Northeast G&P volume growth.
growth_explanation.years_6_10: LNG and industrial load on Gulf pipelines; contracted backlog converts to tariff revenue; dividend grows with distributable cash as expansion capex moderates.

bear.notes: FERC certificate delays, gas price weakness, leverage at 65% debt-to-cap ceiling, expansion capex overruns without tariff recovery

base.notes: FY2025 revenue +13.8% and operating income +25.7%; contracted Transco and Power Innovation backlog; dividend $2.00/sh with mid-single-digit growth

bull.notes: Faster data-center/power load adoption; Haynesville volumes; leverage stable as EBITDA scales; multiple re-rating on AI-power gas demand narrative

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Pipeline and processing plant on balance sheet at $42.0B net PP&E (10-K); no land-at-zero pattern

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Midstream toll roads on contracted capacity, not mineral royalty trust

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: All reportable segments revenue-positive FY2025; operating income $4,196M consolidated

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Revenue remaining performance obligation $4,589M; 2026 growth capex $6.1-6.7B on firm transportation and Power Innovation contracts (10-K Outlook)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Equity-method investments $4.5B (10-K); Gulf Coast storage and JVs flow through segment EBITDA, not separate terminal

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Stable growing dividend; no suspended payout

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Power Innovation onsite gas and generation infrastructure earns through Transmission & Gulf segment growth path
